'''Myrial''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Argazdan/Legends|Argazdan]] who served as the [[Governor/Legends|Provisional Governor]] of [[Argazda/Legends|Argazda]] and the leader of a secessionist [[Vianism|Vianist]] religious sect [[Myrialites|named after her]] during the [[Old Sith Wars]].

==Biography==
With the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] preoccupied with the [[Mandalorian Wars]], Myrial and her followers seceded the [[Kanz sector/Legends|Kanz sector]] from the Republic and established the totalitarian [[Argazdan Redoubt]] in [[3970 BBY]]. Her military forces occupied many systems within the region and enslaved those that refused to adhere to Myrialite beliefs.

In retaliation for their support for the [[Amaltanna/Legends|Amaltannan]] resistance, Myrialite forces conquered and [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] the [[Lorrdian/Legends|Lorrdian]] species. Any attempt from the Republic that she made to reign was soon cut short and was later killed during the [[Mandalorian Wars]].

==Legacy==
Myrial established the totalitarian Argazdan Redoubt that would last for three hundred years, enslaving many of the peoples of the Kanz sector, including the [[Lorrdian/Legends|Lorrdians]]. The atrocities, called the [[Kanz Disorders/Legends|Kanz Disorders]], were eventually ended when the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] overthrew the dictatorship in [[3670 BBY]]. By the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]], most contemporary [[Argazdan/Legends|Argazdans]] looked back on the actions of Myrial and her followers with shame.
